name: Great Wall Jiufu Core Developing Equity Fund (LOF)
summary: Great Wall Jiufu Core Developing Equity Fund (LOF) is a stock fund that focuses on investing in core developing equities and is listed as an Open-Ended Fund (LOF). The fund aims to achieve long-term capital appreciation by identifying and investing in companies with strong growth potential in developing sectors. It is managed by Great Wall Fund Management Co., Ltd., based in China.
